searching:
🔍 Looking for a partner...

Type /stop to cancel.
partner_found: ✅ Partner found! You are now connected anonymously. Start chatting! /next — find a new partner /stop — stop this chat /link — share your profile https://t.me/{bot_username}
already_in_chat:
⚠️ You are already in a chat.

Send /next to change partner or /stop to quit.
already_searching:
⏳ You are already in the search queue.

Type /stop to cancel.
not_in_chat:
❌ You are not in a chat.

Type /search to start.
feedback_prompt: 💬 If you'd like, please leave feedback about your partner. It will help us find a better match for you in the future.
report_sent: ✅ Your report has been received. Thank you!
partner_vip: 💎 Your partner is a VIP user!
help: 📖 How to Use /start or /search — Find an anonymous chat partner /next — Switch to a new partner /stop — Stop the chat /link — Share your Telegram profile with partner /settings — Set age, gender, language /pay — Subscribe to Premium /vip — Subscribe to VIP /paysupport — Contact support /rules — Bot rules /terms — Terms & Conditions /help — Show this message https://t.me/{bot_username}
rules: 📜 Bot Rules 1. No pornographic or NSFW content 2. No spam, ads, or selling 3. No insults, abuse, or harassment 4. No content involving violence against children 5. No suicide or self-harm propaganda 6. No begging 7. Respect other users Violations may result in a permanent ban.
terms: 📋 Terms & Conditions 1. This bot provides anonymous chat services 2. We are not responsible for user-generated content 3. Minimal data is stored for security and moderation 4. Subscriptions are non-refundable except for system errors 5. We reserve the right to ban users who violate rules 6. By using the bot, you agree to all these terms
settings_gender_locked:
🔒 Gender filter is only for Premium/VIP users.

Use /pay to subscribe.
settings_age_invalid: ❌ Invalid age. Enter a number between 13 and 99.
link_msg: 👤 Telegram Profile {name} is inviting you to view their profile. Click the button below:
pay_title: ⭐ Subscribe to Premium Enjoy exclusive features: ✅ Gender filter ✅ No ads ✅ Search priority ✅ Premium badge visible to partners Select a subscription plan below:
vip_title: 💎 Subscribe to VIP Become the most prominent user in our bot! ⏳ VIP account active for 12 months 🧭 Highest search priority — find partners faster 💎 Every partner will see your VIP status 🚻 Gender-based search filter 🚫 No ads 💰 Cost: {stars} Telegram Stars Proceed to payment:
payment_success: 🎉 Payment successful! Your {plan} subscription is active until {expires}. Enjoy all exclusive features!
error_generic: ❌ An error occurred. Please try again.
maintenance: 🔧 Bot is under maintenance. Please try again later.
admin_only: ❌ This command is for admins only.
